description_long: This bungalow is a sprawling, single-story residential building with a complex, multi-sectioned layout and a prominent brown gabled roof. The structure features several wings extending from a central core, with covered porches and verandas visible on multiple sides. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light stone or stucco, contrasting with the dark roof. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. A section of the roof includes solar panels, and there is a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area on one side. The property is surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn and intersecting stone pathways, with a driveway and parking area adjacent to the building.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a brown gabled roof, stone or stucco walls, covered porches, and asymmetrical window arrangements, set within a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, covered porch, and central section of the bungalow, with intersecting stone pathways and a manicured lawn.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear wing with solar panels on the roof, a glass-enclosed sunroom, and the driveway area to the right.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the glass sunroom, additional roof features, and the full extent of the rear wing, along with the parking area.
description_view_3: This angle shows the garage entrance, a secondary porch, and the overall depth of the building, with pathways leading to the main and side entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
